headline: Assessing International Paper (IP) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Recent share performance and business snapshot International Paper (IP) has been on many investors’ screens after a recent stretch of weaker share performance, including a return of 17.3% decline over the past month and 13.6% decline over the past 3 months. The company focuses on renewable fiber based packaging across North America, Latin America, Europe, South America, and North Africa, with revenue of US$23.6b and a reported net loss of US$2.8b. See our latest analysis for International...
